channel.title: JTF News - Just The Facts
channel.description: Verified facts from multiple sources. No opinions. No adjectives. No interpretation. Viewer-supported at github.com/sponsors/larryseyer

item.title: Canada is signing an agreement with the European Union to enhance a free trade d...
item.description: Canada is signing an agreement with the European Union to enhance a free trade deal.

item.title: A Canadian tourist died by drowning in Australia following a dingo attack, accor...
item.description: A Canadian tourist died by drowning in Australia following a dingo attack, according to authorities.

item.title: Israel launches attacks on Tehran and Beirut.
item.description: Israel launches attacks on Tehran and Beirut.

item.title: The DR Congo government reported 200 deaths from a landslide at a mine in a rebe...
item.description: The DR Congo government reported 200 deaths from a landslide at a mine in a rebel-held area.

item.title: [CORRECTION] The United States reported no American casualties following ...
item.description: CORRECTION: Earlier we reported that The United States reported no American casualties following strikes by Iran.. CBC News, France 24 now report that The US military reports 3 service members killed and 5 seriously wounded in conflict with Iran..
